arts.ttl: Man Utd hold Mathys Tel advantage in transfer race with Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: Tel is open to joining United due to the prospect of being an immediate starter at Old Trafford, while Alejandro Garnacho is set to depart before the deadline

arts.ttl: Tottenham begin negotations with Bayern Munich for Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Tottenham have begun negotiations with Bayern Munich over a move for forward Mathys Tel after it was revealed he is open to leaving the club this month.…

arts.sum: Postecoglou, 59, has come under heavy scrutiny in recent weeks amid Spurs' dismal season, with his side having lost eight of their last 10 Premier League games.

arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion, Aston Villa and Tottenham Hotspur are among the clubs chasing 1. FC Nürnberg’s Stefanos Tzimas. On January 18th, Bild reported Unai Emery’s side and Spurs are keen on signing the 19-year-old. arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Elfsborg in their final fixture of the Europa League’s league phase this evening. Ange Postecoglou’s side are in a strong position to qualify and will seal automatic entry to the Round of 16 with a win in North London.
